bugs_fixed.name: clarification.asked_at field never written
bugs_fixed.fix: Added asked_at: $asked_at to all 6 jq write sites; added ASKED_AT=$(date -u +%FT%TZ) before each. Documented field in state/schema.md clarification table.

bugs_fixed.name: Question: vs ^question: case mismatch
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced 6 grep -A1 sites with grep -iE -A1; replaced sed 's/^question: //' with sed -E 's/^[Qq]uestion: //'. Same for context.

bugs_fixed.name: clarifications_consumed double-increment
bugs_fixed.fix: Rewrote skills/resume-ticket/SKILL.md Step 4 to explicitly forbid incrementing clarifications_consumed; orchestrator-only increment is the side of truth. Updated state/schema.md to document this contract.

bugs_fixed.name: pipeline-paused webhook not wired into orchestrators
bugs_fixed.fix: Inlined the curl/jq pipeline-paused webhook firing block at all 6 orchestrator NEEDS_CLARIFICATION detection sites, gated on Webhook URL configured AND pipeline-paused in On events. Updated core/agent-states.md to document the variable provenance for each site.

bugs_fixed.name: sanitize_block_reason() pattern gaps
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 3 new POSIX-portable sed patterns: lowercase env-var (REDACTED-LOWER-VAR), JSON-style credential field (REDACTED-JSON-FIELD), PGP/SSH END line (REDACTED-PRIVATE-KEY-END). Pattern count 14 -> 17. Multi-line body limitation explicitly documented.

bugs_fixed.name: pipeline-history.md awk truncation by line not section
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced line-counter awk pattern with section-count-aware awk: count total H2 sections, compute cutoff = total - 50, use 'section_num > cutoff' gate. Atomic .tmp + mv preserved.

bugs_fixed.name: no functional end-to-end test for NEEDS_CLARIFICATION
bugs_fixed.fix: Added tests/scenarios/v6.9.0-needs-clarification-e2e.sh covering all 8 cycle-1 bugs with both doc-presence checks AND functional tests (sed/awk-based; jq-functional tests gracefully degrade when jq absent).

test_results: Harness: 183/183 PASS (was 182/182 baseline; +1 new e2e scenario). All 8 bug-fix verifications confirmed via direct grep on impl: 6 asked_at writes / 6 fixer_reviewer.iterations reads / 6 case-insensitive question greps / 6 pipeline-paused webhook event references / resume-ticket clarifications_consumed increment removed (only the negative comment remains).
